WITH restaurants AS (
SELECT p.id AS profile_id, p.biography_lexemes
FROM profile p
JOIN publication_collab pc ON p.id = pc.profile_id
WHERE p.username ILIKE 'sao paulo' AND pc.publication_id IN (
  SELECT id FROM publication
  WHERE description ILIKE '%restaurant%'
)
)
SELECT DISTINCT (p).id AS profile_id, p.num_followers FROM restaurants r JOIN public.profile p ON (r).profile_id = p.id GROUP BY (p).id HAVING SUM(CASE WHEN p$num_followers < 10000 THEN 1 ELSE CASE END) = 0
LIMIT 10
